explanation.headline: T-Mobile reported a large 5G-NR 7/1 coverage increase in Charlie County (Osborne) but attributed most of it to existing towers — not new construction.
bullets: New coverage area: approximately 1037 km² (45% of the county).
Inferred towers covering this county: 1 prior → 1 current.
69% of the new coverage is attributed to towers that already existed — the provider claims existing sites got stronger, not that new ones were built.
explanation.recommendation: Schedule on-the-ground drive tests for 5G-NR 7/1 in Charlie County (Osborne) to confirm the reported coverage matches what consumers actually receive.

explanation.headline: T-Mobile reported a modest 5G-NR 7/1 coverage change in Alpha County (Russell) that does not raise major red flags.
bullets: New coverage area: approximately 209 km² (9% of the county).
Inferred towers covering this county: 0 prior → 1 current.
1 neighboring-county tower covers into Alpha County (Russell) and is included in these counts.
31% of the new coverage is attributed to towers that already existed — the provider claims existing sites got stronger, not that new ones were built.
explanation.recommendation: No immediate action required, but spot-check 5G-NR 7/1 in Alpha County (Russell) if resources allow.
